wine_hotels.name: Hotel Le Chambard
wine_hotels.address: 9-13 Rue du General de Gaulle, 68240 Kaysersberg, France
wine_hotels.category: 5-star Relais et Chateaux hotel with Michelin Key
wine_hotels.description: Five-star Relais et Chateaux hotel in 18th-century Kaysersberg, home of Olivier Nasti's two-Michelin-star Table d'Olivier Nasti, an infinity pool spa and a winstub on the Route des Vins.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Two-Michelin-star Table d'Olivier Nasti pairings; winstub with Alsace by-the-glass; concierge cellar visits along the Route des Vins

verified.address_quoted: 9-13 rue du General de Gaulle, 68240 Kaysersberg

wine_hotels.name: La Maison des Tetes
wine_hotels.description: Five-star Relais et Chateaux hotel inside the 1609 Renaissance Maison des Tetes in Colmar, home to chef Eric Girardin's one-Michelin-star restaurant and a historic Alsatian brasserie.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Restaurant Girardin Michelin-star tasting menu; Brasserie Historique with Alsace by-the-glass; concierge-arranged cellar visits

wine_hotels.name: Hotel Quatorze
wine_hotels.description: Boutique 14-key hotel in a former 19th-century pharmacy on Rue des Augustins, steps from Petite Venise and Musee Unterlinden. Curated Alsace wine fridge and concierge tasting bookings.
wine_hotels.wine_program: In-room curated Alsace minibar; concierge bookings at Wolfberger, Hugel and Trimbach cellars

wine_hotels.name: Hotel La Cour du Bailli Suites and Spa
wine_hotels.description: Suite hotel on Bergheim's Grand Rue in a 16th-century property with a spa, restaurant and winstub. Hand-walking distance to the Altenberg Grand Cru and Domaine Marcel Deiss cellar.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Hotel restaurant and winstub pour grower Bergheim Alsace; concierge-arranged tastings at Domaine Marcel Deiss and Sylvie Spielmann

wine_hotels.name: Hotel a la Cour d'Alsace by HappyCulture
wine_hotels.description: Four-star HappyCulture hotel and spa in medieval Obernai, set in 17th-century mansions with a winstub, gastronomic restaurant Le Jardin des Remparts and a deep Alsace cellar.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Le Jardin des Remparts and winstub Cour d'Alsace pour grower Alsace lists; sommelier-led tastings inside the cellar

wine_hotels.name: Domaine du Moulin Hotel and Spa
wine_hotels.address: 44 Rue de la Premiere Armee, 68190 Ensisheim, France
wine_hotels.description: Four-star hotel-spa in Ensisheim 20 minutes from Colmar and Mulhouse, with the Villa du Meunier restaurant and a deep Alsace cellar, plus easy access to southern Alsace Grand Crus.
wine_hotels.wine_program: La Villa du Meunier restaurant features Alsace and French growers; concierge bookings to Schlumberger and Wolfberger

verified.address_quoted: 44 rue de la Premiere Armee - 68190 Ensisheim

wine_hotels.name: Hostellerie La Cheneaudiere
wine_hotels.category: 5-star Relais et Chateaux hotel and spa
wine_hotels.description: Five-star Relais et Chateaux hotel-spa in the Vosges foothills 45 minutes from Strasbourg, home of Jean-Paul Acker's one-Michelin-star Le Feuillage restaurant and a 2,500 sqm spa.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Le Feuillage Michelin pairings; Le Chene bistro with Alsace by-the-glass; concierge cellar visits in the Vallee de la Bruche and the Route des Vins

verified.address_quoted: 3 rue Vieux Moulin Colroy la Roche 67420

wine_hotels.name: Le Schaeferhof
wine_hotels.description: Maison d'hotes inside an 18th-century sheepfold of the Prince-Abbots of Murbach, romantic park and kitchen garden at the foot of the Grand Ballon and Schlumberger Grand Crus.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Host-curated Alsace wine cellar and tastings; walks to Schlumberger Saering, Kessler and Spiegel Grand Crus

wine_hotels.name: Hostellerie du Chateau
wine_hotels.description: Charm hotel in the centre of Eguisheim 5 km from Colmar, a half-timbered town house steps from Wolfberger and Leon Beyer tasting cellars. Family-run with hand-painted Alsatian rooms.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Hand-walking distance to Wolfberger, Leon Beyer and Emile Beyer; in-house wine fridge of grower Alsace selections

wine_hotels.name: Hotel Le Marechal
wine_hotels.address: 4-6 Place des Six Montagnes Noires, 68000 Colmar, France
wine_hotels.description: 16th-century half-timbered mansion on Place des Six Montagnes Noires in Petite Venise, terrace bistro and a deep cellar of Alsace bottles, ten minutes walk from Musee Unterlinden.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Hotel bistro pours an Alsace-led list; concierge bookings along the Route des Vins

verified.address_quoted: 4-6, place des Six-Montagnes-Noires, La Petite Venise - COLMAR 68000

wine_hotels.name: Hotel Saint-Martin
wine_hotels.description: Three-star Logis hotel inside a 14th-century Colmar mansion on Grand Rue, central walkable base for Petite Venise and Place de la Cathedrale. Wine boutiques and tasting rooms nearby.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Concierge tastings at La Sommeliere, Vinum and the Musee des Vins d'Alsace; walking distance to Le Cercle des Aromes

wine_hotels.name: Le Rosenmeer
wine_hotels.address: 45 Avenue de la Gare, 67560 Rosheim, France
wine_hotels.description: Maetz family hotel-restaurant since 1850 facing Rosheim station on the Mont Sainte-Odile foothills, an Alsace base for visiting Mittelbergheim Zotzenberg and Andlau Kastelberg crus.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Hotel restaurant Le Rosenmeer-Hubert Maetz pours an Alsace-led list; concierge bookings at Mittelbergheim and Andlau cellars

verified.address_quoted: 45 Avenue De La Gare, Rosheim, France, 67560

wine_hotels.name: Hostellerie Saint-Florent
wine_hotels.description: Family-run hotel-restaurant in Oberhaslach near Molsheim, Vosges foothill setting with traditional Alsace cuisine and a regional wine cellar of grower Klevner and Sylvaner.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Hotel restaurant pours grower Molsheim and Andlau wines; concierge bookings at Domaine Pfister and Loew

wine_hotels.name: Chateau d'Isenbourg and Spa
wine_hotels.description: Five-star Grandes Etapes hotel in a hilltop chateau above Rouffach, set in five hectares of vineyard with panoramic views to the Vosges and Black Forest. Restaurant and cellar visits.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Chateau cellar of 700 references with deep Alsace; on-site vineyard tour and tasting; sommelier-led pairings at the gastronomic restaurant

wine_hotels.name: Hostellerie des Chateaux and Spa
wine_hotels.description: Four-star spa hotel near Obernai on the Route des Vins with a 2,500 sqm spa, Le Gastronomique restaurant and Le Comptoir du Chateau bistrot in the Vosges foothills.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Two restaurants with grower Alsace cellar; concierge cellar visits at Pinot Noir specialists Ottrott Rouge d'Ottrott vineyards

wine_hotels.name: Le Clos des Sources Hotel and Spa
wine_hotels.description: Three-star spa hotel in the wooded village of Thannenkirch between Strasbourg and Colmar, 10 km from the Route des Vins, with an indoor pool, sauna and hammam.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Cellar weighted to grower Alsace; concierge bookings at Ribeauville, Bergheim and Rorschwihr cellars
